Specification

Product Information

Item Code:W2139P194438

Product Type:General Item

Product Name:Vanity, Makeup Vanity Desk Set with Mirror & Light, Dressing Table Storage Lots with Power Strip, 3 Lighting Modes with Adjustable Brightness, 37 Inches (White with Stool)

Main Color:White

Main Material:Particle Board+MDF

Product Style:Modern

Number of Drawers:4 Drawers

Number of Doors:2 or Less

Wardrobes Features:Mirror Included

Type of Storage Included:Drawer

Drawer Features:Extra Deep Drawers

Use Case:Bedroom

Product Dimensions

Assembled Length (in.):35.43

Assembled Width (in.):15.75

Assembled Height (in.):53.54

Weight (lbs.):74.80

Package Size

Length (in.):39.76

Width (in.):28.74

Product Features

  • [Built-in Charging Station] This makeup table is equipped with 2 standard plug sockets and 2 USB ports, making it more convenient for powering LED lights, PCs, mobile phones, and hair dryers.
  • [Hollywood-Style Mirror with Adjustable Lighting] Enjoy the luxury of 10 dimmable LED bulbs offering three color modes: warm yellow, warm white, and cold white light. This versatile makeup vanity caters to your unique preferences, whether it's for home makeup application, salon use, or live broadcasts.
  • [Functional and Unique Design] We've included a dedicated hair dryer rack for added convenience and no more rummaging through drawers. Plus, our vanity comes with an anti-tip device for enhanced child safety, and it can be securely fixed to the wall.
  • [Ample Storage Space] This thoughtfully sized vanity mirror with lights and table set (31.5”(L)*15.8”(W)*57.7”(H)) offers ample storage. With spacious drawers, three shelves, and an extra cushioned stool, you'll have enough room for all your makeup essentials, hair tools, jewelry, and lotions. Keep your desktop organized and clutter-free.
